creator: groot@kde.org
text:
Created attachment 170030
Fix plist, use other subst

This comes from area51, the KDE-FreeBSD staging area.

The patch switches a lib-version substitution from KDE4_VERSION to KDE4_GENERIC_LIB_VERSION. This is already used in other peripheral-to-KDE-workspace applications like audio/amarok. This is preliminary work for KDE4 infrastructure changes.

Patch applies with -p4.
